import pytest
from source import sieve

def test_sieve_returns_correct_primes_up_to_7():
    """Sieve should return the exact list of primes up to 7."""
    result = sieve(7)
    expected = [2, 3, 5, 7]
    assert result == expected, f"Expected primes up to 7 to be {expected}, got {result}"
